sourceMovie.title: Her Blue Sky
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Her Blue Sky works as a animation movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The animation and romance blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Your Name.
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Her Blue Sky clicked for you, Your Name. (2016) is a strong next stop: both trade in animation and romance, with emotional whiplash that feels honest. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Her Blue Sky?
faq.answer: Try Your Name., 5 Centimeters per Second, Only Yesterday—each shares DNA with Her Blue Sky while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Her Blue Sky?
faq.answer: Her Blue Sky (2019) is best described as Animation, Romance. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Her Blue Sky worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this animation lane.
